macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: YouTube expands AI likeness detection to all users over 18
items.summary: YouTube is broadening access to its AI likeness detection tool, which scans for facial matches and can help identify unauthorized use of a creator's image. The feature, previously limited to select users, is now available to any account holder age 18 or older.

items.title: Meta reportedly hires four more OpenAI researchers
items.summary: A report says Meta has added four more OpenAI researchers to its team, underscoring the ongoing talent competition among top AI labs. The hires, named in the report, reflect how aggressively major companies are recruiting experienced model researchers.

items.title: OpenAI acquires Weights.gg, an AI voice-cloning tools startup
items.summary: OpenAI has reportedly acquired Weights.gg, a startup that provided tools for creating and sharing AI-generated voices. The deal highlights continued consolidation in the AI tools market, especially around generative audio capabilities.

items.title: EY withdraws loyalty rewards study after AI hallucinations found
items.summary: Professional services firm EY reportedly pulled a study after researchers found apparent AI-generated hallucinations and fabricated footnotes. The incident adds to growing scrutiny of AI-assisted research and the need for verification in corporate reports.

items.title: OpenAI's ChatGPT experiences outage as users report prompt-loading issues
items.summary: Users reported problems loading prompts in ChatGPT, pointing to a service disruption affecting the popular chatbot. The incident is another reminder of the operational reliability challenges facing major AI services.

items.title: AI-exposed US occupations continued to see weaker job growth
items.summary: New labor data highlighted on Techmeme shows employment in 18 AI-exposed occupations fell 0.2% from May 2024 to May 2025, while overall US employment rose 0.8%. The trend supports broader concerns that AI is reshaping demand for some white-collar roles faster than the labor market overall.

items.title: Google reportedly explores SpaceX as launch partner for orbital data centers
items.summary: Reports suggest Google is in talks with SpaceX to help launch equipment for its orbital data center initiative, Project Suncatcher. The move points to growing industry interest in space-based compute and infrastructure as AI demand expands.

items.title: Restricted Nvidia AI hardware smuggling network uncovered
items.summary: A network allegedly smuggling restricted Nvidia AI chips has been identified, with shipments reportedly reaching destinations including Alibaba. The case highlights persistent shortages, export-control pressures, and a gray market for high-demand AI hardware.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Bungie delays Destiny 2 news as Marathon gets more attention
items.summary: A recent Bungie update has sparked criticism from Destiny 2 players after the studio said major June news would come closer to release, while Marathon continues to receive more visible updates. Commentary around the post suggests concern that Destiny 2 is being deprioritized in favor of Marathon.

items.title: Fortnite collaboration wave rumored to be partially scrapped or delayed
items.summary: A gaming news video claims some Fortnite collaborations, including The Boys and Invincible wave three, are not currently in the game files for the latest update. The video suggests other collaborations and in-game changes are still expected to arrive later.

items.title: New retro gaming updates include CPS3, Neo Geo, and Gradius 3 releases
items.summary: A retro and FPGA gaming roundup highlights several fresh releases and updates, including Gradius 3, Breakers on Neo Geo, and a new RetroTink5X firmware update. The episode also mentions ongoing work across multiple classic hardware platforms and emulation scenes.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Microsoft is fixing a long-standing Windows 11 annoyance
items.summary: Microsoft is rolling out changes aimed at improving one of the most frustrating parts of Windows 11, according to recent tech coverage. The update focuses on usability improvements for the desktop experience.

items.title: Windows 11 build 26300.8493 adds movable taskbar and smaller taskbar mode
items.summary: A new Windows 11 build reportedly introduces a movable taskbar, a smaller taskbar mode, and fluid dictation improvements. These changes are part of ongoing refinement of the Windows desktop interface.

items.title: Google may limit new Gmail accounts to 5GB of free storage
items.summary: Reports suggest new Gmail accounts could soon be capped at 5GB of free storage, matching a tighter approach to free account limits. Some users may be able to work around the restriction through existing Google services.

items.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 sales reportedly hit a wall after a strong start
items.summary: Early sales momentum for the Galaxy S26 series appears to be slowing, with price cited as a major factor. Other reports, however, say overall Galaxy S26 sales were still above the Galaxy S25 at this stage.

items.title: Nvidia’s China outlook remains unclear after Trump-Xi summit
items.summary: Nvidia faces continued uncertainty over its business prospects in China following the Trump-Xi summit. The company’s access to the market remains a key issue amid broader U.S.-China tech tensions.

items.title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT for personal finance
items.summary: OpenAI has introduced a ChatGPT offering focused on personal finance that can connect to bank accounts. The launch expands ChatGPT into consumer financial planning and account aggregation.

items.title: Android users can now share files with iPhones via QR code
items.summary: A new cross-platform file-sharing feature lets Android users transfer files to iPhones by scanning a QR code. This marks another step toward easier interoperability between mobile ecosystems.

items.title: Leader of Microsoft Israel to step down amid probe
items.summary: The head of Microsoft Israel is stepping down while the company is under investigation, according to recent reporting. The move adds to a series of corporate personnel developments at Microsoft.
